name: DeepSeek
problem: Need advanced coding assistance and complex reasoning without breaking the bank
description: Open-source AI model with exceptional coding and reasoning capabilities, rivaling Claude at a fraction of the cost
bestFor: Developers, researchers, anyone needing advanced reasoning on a budget
avoidIf: You need the absolute latest model or enterprise support
useCase: A developer uses DeepSeek API to build a code review tool, saving $500/month compared to Claude API

name: Kimi
problem: Need to analyze lengthy documents, research papers, or contracts that exceed typical AI context limits
description: AI assistant with 200K token context window, perfect for processing entire books, legal documents, or research papers in one go
bestFor: Researchers, lawyers, students, content creators working with long documents
avoidIf: You primarily need image generation or don't work with long texts
useCase: A lawyer analyzes a 100-page contract in one conversation, identifying key clauses without splitting the document

name: 豆包 (Doubao)
problem: Need a reliable AI assistant for everyday tasks without subscription fees
description: ByteDance's conversational AI with strong Chinese language understanding and completely free access
bestFor: Chinese speakers, students, anyone wanting free daily AI assistance
avoidIf: You need cutting-edge reasoning or specialized professional features
useCase: A student uses Doubao daily for homework help, translation, and brainstorming without any cost

name: 即梦 (Jimeng)
problem: Need high-quality AI-generated images with Asian aesthetic understanding at affordable prices
description: AI image generator from ByteDance with exceptional understanding of Chinese culture and Asian aesthetics
bestFor: Designers creating Asian-themed content, social media creators, e-commerce sellers
avoidIf: You exclusively need photorealistic Western portraits
useCase: An e-commerce seller generates 50 product lifestyle images with Chinese New Year theme for $10

name: 可灵 (Kling)
problem: Need to create professional video content without expensive equipment or editing skills
description: AI video generator with impressive motion quality, supporting text-to-video and image-to-video conversion
bestFor: Content creators, marketers, social media managers, short video producers
avoidIf: You need Hollywood-level cinematic production quality
useCase: A marketer creates 10 product demo videos from text descriptions in one afternoon, saving weeks of production time

name: 妙鸭相机 (Miaoya)
problem: Need professional headshots, ID photos, or product images without hiring a photographer
description: AI photo studio that generates professional portraits, ID photos, and styled images from selfies
priceComparison: 98% cheaper than professional photo studio ($1.4 vs $100+)
bestFor: Job seekers, freelancers, e-commerce sellers needing product lifestyle photos
avoidIf: You need physical prints or very specific custom poses
useCase: A freelancer generates 50 professional headshots in different styles for LinkedIn, resume, and website for $1.40

name: 剪映 (CapCut Pro)
problem: Need professional video editing with auto-captions and voiceover without expensive software
description: Professional video editor with AI-powered auto-captions, voiceover, and effects - completely free
bestFor: YouTubers, TikTokers, content creators, video editors on a budget
avoidIf: You need advanced color grading or professional film editing features
useCase: A YouTuber edits 10 videos per month with auto-captions in 20 languages, saving $275/month on Premiere + Descript

name: 讯飞智文 (iFlytek Writer)
problem: Need to write long articles, reports, or documents with AI assistance and research integration
description: AI writing assistant specialized in long-form content with research, outlining, and citation features
bestFor: Bloggers, researchers, students, content marketers writing long-form content
avoidIf: You only write short social media posts or need English-first optimization
useCase: A blogger writes 8 in-depth articles per month with AI research assistance for $4 instead of $49

name: 腾讯智影 (Tencent Smart Video)
problem: Need to create talking-head videos without appearing on camera or hiring actors
description: AI digital human video generator with realistic avatars, supporting text-to-speech in multiple languages
bestFor: Educators, trainers, marketers creating explainer or training videos
useCase: A training company creates 20 course videos with AI avatars for $14/month instead of hiring actors

name: 飞书妙记 (Lark Minutes)
problem: Need accurate meeting transcription and AI-generated summaries without manual note-taking
description: AI meeting assistant that transcribes, summarizes, and extracts action items from meetings automatically
bestFor: Remote teams, managers, anyone attending frequent meetings
avoidIf: You don't use Lark/Feishu for team collaboration
useCase: A remote team transcribes 40 hours of meetings per month with AI summaries, saving $200/year

name: WPS AI
problem: Need AI assistance for writing, editing, and formatting documents without expensive Microsoft Copilot
description: AI-powered office suite with document writing, data analysis, and presentation creation features
bestFor: Office workers, students, small businesses needing document AI assistance
avoidIf: Your organization requires Microsoft 365 for compliance
useCase: A small business uses WPS AI for all document work, saving $324/year per employee vs Microsoft Copilot

name: 通义灵码 (Tongyi Lingma)
problem: Need AI coding assistance with strong Chinese documentation understanding
description: AI coding assistant from Alibaba with excellent Chinese code comment understanding and generation
bestFor: Chinese developers, students learning to code, open-source contributors
avoidIf: You need the most cutting-edge model or work exclusively in English
useCase: A developer uses Tongyi Lingma for daily coding, saving $120/year vs GitHub Copilot
